value.expression:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS RunCount, Status 
FROM PayrollRuns 
WHERE PayrollMonth = '$strMnth$' 
AND PayrollYear = '$strYear$'
GROUP BY Status

INSERT INTO PayrollRuns 
(PayrollMonth, PayrollYear, Status, StartTime)
VALUES 
('$strMnth$', '$strYear$', 'In Progress', GETDATE())

Payroll for $strMnth$ $strYear$ has already 
been processed and marked Completed. Please contact 
the system admin to reprocess.

INSERT INTO PayrollDetails (
    EmpID, EmployeeName, Department,
    PayrollMonth, PayrollYear,
    BasicSalary, HRA, DA, OvertimePay, Bonus, GrossSalary,
    PF_Deduction, ESI_Deduction, ProfessionalTax, TDS,
    AdvanceDeducted, NetSalary, ProcessedDateTime
)
VALUES (
    '$currentRow{EmpID}$', '$currentRow{EmployeeName}$', '$currentRow{Department}$',
    '$strMnth$', '$strYear$',
    $currentRow{BasicSalary}$, $currentRow{HRA}$, $currentRow{DA}$,
    $currentRow{OvertimePay}$, $currentRow{Bonus}$, $currentRow{GrossSalary}$,
    $currentRow{PF}$, $currentRow{ESI}$, $currentRow{PT}$, $currentRow{TDS}$,
    $currentRow{Advance}$, $currentRow{NetSalary}$, GETDATE()
)

UPDATE PayrollRuns
SET Status = 'Completed',
    EndTime = GETDATE(),
    EmployeesProcessed = $nDBInserted.Number:toString$
WHERE PayrollMonth = '$strMnth$'
AND PayrollYear = '$strYear$'
AND Status = 'In Progress'

SELECT Status FROM PayrollRuns
WHERE PayrollMonth = '$strMnth$'
AND PayrollYear = '$strYear$'
